name: Apple Watch SE (2024)
introText: The Apple Watch SE 2024 is the most affordable Apple Watch with crash detection, fall detection, and GPS — the best iPhone-paired smartwatch under $400 at $329 CAD on Amazon.ca.

specs.Health: Heart rate + crash detection + fall detection + emergency SOS

whatWorks: Crash detection and fall detection at $329 — safety features that could call emergency services if you're in an accident or unconscious, at the most affordable Apple Watch price.
Full Apple Watch ecosystem access at a lower price — same watchOS 11, same App Store, same Apple Pay, same iPhone integration as the Series 10.
worthKnowing: No ECG or blood oxygen monitoring — the SE lacks the health sensor features of the Series 10; for users who want medical-grade heart monitoring, the Series 10 is necessary.
No Always-On display — the SE's display turns off between interactions, unlike the Series 10's Always-On display.

commonComplaints.title: Missing ECG and blood oxygen
commonComplaints.body: The SE's health monitoring doesn't include ECG or SpO2. Users who want these features must step up to the Series 10 at $220 more.

commonComplaints.title: No Always-On display
commonComplaints.body: The screen turns off between wrist raises. Users who glance at their watch frequently find the wrist-raise activation occasionally slow.

commonComplaints.title: No cellular option
commonComplaints.body: The Apple Watch SE only comes in GPS-only configuration — users who want LTE independence from their iPhone must buy the Series 10.

verdict: The Apple Watch SE 2024 is the best Apple Watch for budget-conscious iPhone users who want safety features and fitness tracking without the health monitoring premium. If ECG, blood oxygen, or Always-On display matter, save up for the Series 10. For most users, the SE covers 90% of the use case at 60% of the price.

realBuyers.quote: Bought for my teenager. Crash detection and fall detection were the features we needed. Perfect for the price.
Don't need ECG. The SE tracks my workouts, sleep, and rings. Everything I need at $329.
Gave my old Series 8 to my wife and got the SE. Honestly can't tell the difference in daily use.

sources.title: Apple Watch SE Review — The Verge

metaDescription: Apple Watch SE 2024 review Canada: crash detection, fall detection, GPS, 18-hr battery. $329 CAD. Best value Apple Watch for Canadians.
